hero.title: Discover & Share AI Skills
hero.subtitle: Build powerful AI agents with community-driven skills

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Enterprise-grade security for your AI workflows

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Share and discover skills from developers worldwide

integration.title: Easy Integration
integration.description: Seamlessly integrate with your existing tools

landing.description: Self-hosted private skill registry, providing secure and efficient skill sharing and collaboration for teams
landing.whyDescription: Enterprise-grade skill management platform with complete publishing, discovery, and governance capabilities

privateDeploy.title: Private Deployment
privateDeploy.description: Fully self-hosted with data sovereignty. One-click deploy to your infrastructure, running securely behind your firewall.

versionControl.title: Version Control
versionControl.description: Semantic versioning, custom tags (beta, stable), automatic latest version tracking.

smartSearch.title: Smart Search
smartSearch.description: Full-text search with multi-dimensional filtering by namespace, downloads, ratings, and time.

teamwork.title: Team Collaboration
teamwork.description: Namespace management, role-based access control (Owner/Admin/Member), publishing policy configuration.

governance.title: Review & Governance
governance.description: Team-level review, platform-level approval, full audit trail, meeting compliance requirements.

cliFirst.title: CLI First
cliFirst.description: Native REST API, compatible with existing ClawHub CLI tools, no client-side changes needed.

landing.ctaDescription: Start your local development environment with a single command and experience the complete skill management workflow

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.subtitle: 快速开始
quickStart.description: Get started with SkillHub in just a few simple steps
quickStart.tip: 💡 Tip: Visit the skill detail page for one-click install commands with environment variables

configureEnv.title: 1. Configure Environment Variables
configureEnv.description: Configure ClawHub CLI to connect to SkillHub

installSkills.title: 2. Install Skills
installSkills.description: Search and install the skills you need
installSkills.code:
# Search skills
clawhub search <keyword>

# Install skill
clawhub install <skill>

publishSkills.title: 3. Publish Skills
publishSkills.description: Share your skills with the team
publishSkills.code:
# Publish skill
clawhub publish

# Or use web interface
# Click "Publish Skill"

home.subtitle: Modern Skill Registry
home.description: Efficient skill management, distribution, and collaboration platform for developers
home.popularDescription: Most popular skills in the community

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.subtitle: 快速开始
quickStart.description: Get started with SkillHub in just a few simple steps
quickStart.tip: 💡 Tip: Visit the skill detail page for one-click install commands with environment variables

configureEnv.title: 1. Configure Environment Variables
configureEnv.description: Configure ClawHub CLI to connect to SkillHub

installSkills.title: 2. Install Skills
installSkills.description: Search and install the skills you need
installSkills.code:
# Search skills
clawhub search <keyword>

# Install skill
clawhub install <skill>

publishSkills.title: 3. Publish Skills
publishSkills.description: Share your skills with the team
publishSkills.code:
# Publish skill
clawhub publish

# Or use web interface

search.title: Search Skills
search.noStarredSkills: You have not starred any skills yet

login.title: Login to SkillHub
login.subtitle: Choose a method to continue
login.oauthHint: After GitHub authentication, you will be automatically redirected back to this site.
login.passwordCompatHint: This deployment has the password compatibility layer enabled. The form will route to {{name}} instead of the fixed local account endpoint.
login.enterpriseSsoHint: This deployment has the compatibility layer enabled. If your browser already has a {{name}} session, you can try establishing a SkillHub session directly.
login.enterpriseSsoAutoHint: This deployment has automatic {{name}} probing enabled. If it does not succeed, you can continue with the standard login methods.
login.agreementPrefix: By logging in, you agree to our

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Register locally or sign in directly with OAuth.
register.passwordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters with 3 character types
register.oauthHint: Sign in directly with your existing OAuth account, no local password needed.

device.title: Device Authorization
device.subtitle: Enter the 8-digit user code shown on your device
device.incompleteCode: Please enter the complete 8-digit user code
device.defaultError: Authorization failed, please check the user code
device.notice: After authorization, the device will have access to your account

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your account and API Tokens
dashboard.mySkillsPreviewDescription: Only the first few skills are shown here. Open My Skills to see the rest.
dashboard.mySkillsPreviewEmpty: You have not published any skills yet

mySkills.title: My Skills
mySkills.subtitle: Manage your published skills
mySkills.archiveConfirmDescription: After archiving, regular users will no longer be able to view or download "{{skill}}". Continue?
mySkills.unarchiveConfirmDescription: "{{skill}}" will become visible again and can publish new versions after being restored.
mySkills.unarchiveSuccessDescription: "{{skill}}" has been restored and can publish new versions again.
mySkills.withdrawConfirmDescription: After withdrawal, "{{skill}}" will no longer be reviewed and the pending version will be deleted.
mySkills.withdrawSuccessDescription: The pending version for "{{skill}}" has been withdrawn.
mySkills.promotionConfirmDescription: Submit v{{version}} of "{{skill}}" for promotion into the global namespace?
mySkills.promotionSuccessDescription: v{{version}} of "{{skill}}" is now in the global promotion review queue.
mySkills.promotionDuplicateDescription: This version already has a pending promotion request.
mySkills.promotionAlreadyPromotedDescription: This skill has already been promoted to the global namespace.

myNamespaces.title: My Namespaces
myNamespaces.subtitle: Manage your namespaces and teams
myNamespaces.createDialogDescription: You will become the OWNER after creation and can continue managing members, reviews, and skill publishing.
myNamespaces.createSlugHint: Use 2-64 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens, without leading or trailing hyphens.
myNamespaces.createSlugLength: Namespace slug must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters
myNamespaces.createSlugPattern: Namespace slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens
myNamespaces.createSlugDoubleHyphen: Namespace slug cannot contain consecutive hyphens
myNamespaces.createSlugReserved: "{{slug}}" is reserved. Please choose another slug.
myNamespaces.createDisplayNameLength: Display name must be at most {{max}} characters
myNamespaces.createDescriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this namespace is for, who uses it, or how it is governed
myNamespaces.createDescriptionLength: Description must be at most {{max}} characters
myNamespaces.createSuccessDescription: "{{name}}" is ready. You can now manage members or publish skills.
myNamespaces.activeHint: This namespace is fully active and can continue managing members, reviews, and skill publishing.
myNamespaces.frozenHint: This namespace is frozen. Members can still view it, but it is read-only and cannot publish or change membership.
myNamespaces.archivedHint: This namespace is archived. Public entry points are hidden, but you can still view and restore it from the dashboard.
myNamespaces.immutableHint: This is a built-in system namespace and always remains read-only.
myNamespaces.freezeConfirmDescription: "{{name}}" will become read-only after freezing. Continue?
myNamespaces.unfreezeConfirmDescription: "{{name}}" will regain normal management and publishing after unfreezing.
myNamespaces.archiveConfirmDescription: "{{name}}" will be hidden from public entry points and only remain recoverable from the dashboard.
myNamespaces.restoreConfirmDescription: "{{name}}" will return to an active operating state.
myNamespaces.archiveSuccessDescription: "{{name}}" is now hidden from public entry points.
myNamespaces.emptyDescription: Create a namespace to organize your skills

tokens.pageSubtitle: Manage access credentials for CLI and API

promotions.title: Promotion Review
promotions.subtitle: Review team skill promotion requests to global namespace

adminUsers.title: User Management
adminUsers.subtitle: Manage platform users and permissions
adminUsers.searchHint: Enter a username or email, then press Enter or click Search.
adminUsers.changeRoleDesc: Assign a new role to user {{username}}
adminUsers.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to disable user {{username}}?
adminUsers.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to enable user {{username}}?

security.title: Security Settings
security.subtitle: Update your password when local account login is enabled.
security.successDescription: Please sign in again with your new password.

accounts.initiateDesc: Enter the secondary account identifier. Supports local username or `provider:subject` format for external identities.
accounts.verifyDesc: Complete token verification first, then confirm to execute data migration.
accounts.verifySuccess: Verification successful, confirm to execute the merge

namespace.emptyDescription: No skills have been published in this namespace yet

skillDetail.notFoundDesc: This skill may have been deleted or never existed
skillDetail.loginRequiredDesc: This skill is private. Please login to view details.
skillDetail.accessDeniedDesc: You don't have permission to view this skill
skillDetail.readmeUnavailable: README is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or re-upload this skill version.
skillDetail.documentationUnavailable: The documentation file could not be loaded. You can still inspect the package contents in the file list.
skillDetail.noDocumentationDescription: This skill version does not include a readable overview file.
skillDetail.noDocumentationHint: Many skills only ship executable files. You can continue with the file list and version details below.
skillDetail.lifecycleHint: You can archive this skill. Archived skills are hidden from regular users and cannot be downloaded.
skillDetail.archivedPublishHint: This skill is archived. Restore it before publishing a new version.
skillDetail.archivedInstallHint: This skill is archived and not available for public download.
skillDetail.pendingPreviewTitle: You are previewing a pending version
skillDetail.pendingPreviewDescription: This version is only visible to you. Before review approval, you can inspect the README, files, and version information, but you cannot star, rate, report, or download it.
skillDetail.pendingPreviewInteractionHint: Stars, ratings, and reports are disabled while this version is pending review.
skillDetail.archiveConfirmDescription: After archiving, regular users will no longer be able to view or download "{{skill}}". Continue?
skillDetail.unarchiveConfirmDescription: "{{skill}}" will become visible again and can publish new versions after being restored.
skillDetail.withdrawReviewConfirmDescription: After withdrawal, version {{version}} will leave the review queue and be removed from this skill.
skillDetail.withdrawReviewSuccessDescription: Version {{version}} has been withdrawn from review.
skillDetail.deleteVersionConfirmDescription: Version {{version}} cannot be recovered after deletion. Continue?
skillDetail.versionCompareUnavailableDescription: Publish at least two versions before using version comparison.
skillDetail.rereleaseDialogDescription: Create a new published version based on v{{version}}.
skillDetail.promotionSectionDescription: Submit the currently published version v{{version}} for review into the global namespace.
skillDetail.promotionConfirmDescription: Submit v{{version}} of "{{skill}}" for promotion into the global namespace?
skillDetail.promotionSuccessDescription: v{{version}} of "{{skill}}" is now in the global promotion review queue.
skillDetail.promotionDuplicateDescription: This version already has a pending promotion request.
skillDetail.promotionAlreadyPromotedDescription: This skill has already been promoted to the global namespace.
skillDetail.reportDialogDescription: Provide a reason so administrators can review and act on it quickly.
skillDetail.reportReasonPlaceholder: Reason, for example policy violation, misleading content, or infringement
skillDetail.reportSuccessDescription: Administrators will review this report soon.

reports.title: Skill Reports
reports.subtitle: Handle user-submitted skill reports
reports.resolveConfirmDescription: Mark the report for "{{skill}}" as handled?
reports.resolveAndHideConfirmDescription: Resolve the report for "{{skill}}" and hide the skill from public access?
reports.resolveAndArchiveConfirmDescription: Resolve the report for "{{skill}}" and archive the skill?
reports.resolveSuccessDescription: The report for "{{skill}}" has been marked as handled.
reports.resolveAndHideSuccessDescription: "{{skill}}" has been hidden after the report was resolved.
reports.resolveAndArchiveSuccessDescription: "{{skill}}" has been archived after the report was resolved.
reports.dismissSuccessDescription: The report for "{{skill}}" has been dismissed.
reports.resolveAndHideErrorTitle: Failed to resolve report and hide skill
reports.resolveAndArchiveErrorTitle: Failed to resolve report and archive skill

governance.title: Governance Center
governance.subtitle: Track reviews, promotions, reports, and audit activity in one place.
governance.inboxSubtitle: Unified queue for operational work that still needs action.
governance.emptyInbox: No governance work items right now.
governance.notificationsSubtitle: Recent governance updates that need your attention.
governance.activitySubtitle: Recent audit events for review, promotion, report, and lifecycle actions.

members.title: Member Management
members.addDialogDescription: Search platform users or enter a user ID directly. Added users can collaborate in this namespace immediately.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search by username, email, or user ID
members.searchHint: Enter at least 2 characters to search. Results will include the user ID you can add directly.
members.searchTooShort: Search keywords must be at least 2 characters
members.searchEmpty: No active users are available to add
members.manualUserIdHint: If you already know the user ID, you can add it directly here.
members.globalReadOnly: This is a built-in system namespace. Membership can only be viewed and cannot be changed.
members.frozenReadOnly: This namespace is frozen. You can still view members, but cannot add, remove, or change roles.
members.archivedReadOnly: This namespace is archived. You can still view members, but cannot change membership until it is restored.
members.memberReadOnly: You are a regular member in this namespace. You can view the membership list, but only the OWNER or ADMIN can make changes.
members.addSuccessDescription: User {{userId}} has been added to this namespace.
members.removeConfirmDescription: After removal, user {{userId}} will lose access to this namespace.
members.removeSuccessDescription: User {{userId}} has been removed from this namespace.

upload.dragHint: Drag a ZIP file here, or click to select

layout.footerDescription: Modern skill registry, providing efficient skill management and distribution for developers.

nsReviews.title: Namespace Reviews
nsReviews.globalReadOnly: This is a built-in system namespace. Review history is visible, but no new review actions are allowed.
nsReviews.frozenReadOnly: This namespace is frozen. You can still view review history, but cannot continue processing review tasks.
nsReviews.archivedReadOnly: This namespace is archived. You can still view review history, but cannot continue processing review tasks until it is restored.

namespaceStatus.frozenHint: This namespace is currently read-only and cannot publish, review, or change members.
namespaceStatus.archivedHint: This namespace is hidden from public entry points and only visible to dashboard members.
namespaceStatus.immutableHint: This is a built-in system namespace and does not allow governance or membership changes.

createToken.title: Create API Token
createToken.description: Create a new API Token for CLI or API access
createToken.nameTooLong: Token name must be at most {{max}} characters
createToken.nameDuplicate: You already have a token with this name
createToken.successDescription: Copy and save this token now. It is only shown and copyable at creation time. If you need it again later, create a new token.
createToken.expirationHint: By default, tokens never expire. You can also choose an automatic expiration time.
createToken.expiresAtRequired: Please choose a custom expiration time
createToken.copyFailed: Failed to copy token. Please try again.

skillCard.unstarDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}" from your starred skills?

publish.title: Publish Skill
publish.subtitle: Upload skill package to SkillHub

reviewNotice.title: Review Notice
reviewNotice.description: Submitted skill packages require admin review before publication. Once approved, your skill will be visible to all users.

publish.successDescription: {{skill}} has been submitted for review and will be available after admin approval
publish.timeoutDescription: The publish request took too long. Please check the skill list later or try again.
publish.versionExistsDescription: This skill version has already been published. Update the version in SKILL.md, rebuild the package, and upload it again.
publish.precheckFailedDescription: The package appears to contain a secret, token, or password. Replace real credentials with placeholders and try again.
publish.frontmatterFailedDescription: Please check the YAML frontmatter at the top of SKILL.md. If a field value contains a colon, wrap it in quotes.

review.rejectReasonRequired: A reason is required when rejecting
review.approveDescription: Are you sure you want to approve this review?
review.rejectDescription: Are you sure you want to reject this review?

token.title: API Tokens
token.copyHint: For security reasons, token plaintext can only be copied once when it is created. It cannot be viewed or copied again later. If you still need it, create a new token.
token.emptyHint: Click the button above to create your first token
token.name: Name
token.copyFailed: Failed to copy token. Please try again.
token.copyUnavailableTitle: Older token plaintext cannot be copied again
token.copyUnavailableDescription: Token plaintext is only shown once after creation. If you no longer have it, please create a new token.
token.editExpirationDescription: Set a new expiration time for token "{{name}}".
token.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete token "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

apiError.unauthorized: Session expired, please log in again
apiError.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action
apiError.notFound: The requested resource was not found
apiError.serverError: Server error, please try again later
apiError.networkError: Network connection failed, please check your network

local.accountMerged: This account has been merged and can no longer be used to log in
local.locked: Too many failed attempts. Please try again later

direct.providerUnsupported: This login method is not supported

sessionBootstrap.providerUnsupported: This SSO bootstrap method is not supported
sessionBootstrap.notAuthenticated: No authenticated external session was found
